mapper.select:
SELECT si.inquiry_id, si.inquiry_no, si.user_id, COALESCE(u.name, u.username) AS author_name, u.username AS author_username, si.category_code, si.title, si.content_text, si.answer_content_text, si.status, si.has_attachments, si.created_at, si.updated_at, si.answered_at FROM pgdev.support_inquiries si JOIN pgdev.users u ON u.user_id = si.user_id
ORDER BY si.created_at ASC, si.inquiry_id ASC
ORDER BY si.created_at DESC, si.inquiry_id DESC
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pgdev.support_inquiries si JOIN pgdev.users u ON u.user_id = si.user_id

SELECT si.inquiry_id, si.inquiry_no, si.user_id, COALESCE(u.name, u.username) AS author_name, u.username AS author_username, si.category_code, si.title, si.content_text, si.answer_content_text, si.status, si.has_attachments, si.created_at, si.updated_at, si.answered_at FROM pgdev.support_inquiries si JOIN pgdev.users u ON u.user_id = si.user_id WHERE si.inquiry_id = #{id}

SELECT file_id, inquiry_id, owner_type, file_role, original_file_name, file_url, mime_type, file_size_bytes, created_at FROM pgdev.support_inquiry_files WHERE inquiry_id = #{inquiryId} ORDER BY owner_type ASC, sort_order ASC, file_id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE pgdev.support_inquiries SET status = #{status}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, answered_at = CASE WHEN #{status} = 'ANSWERED' THEN COALESCE(answered_at, #{updatedAt}) ELSE answered_at END WHERE inquiry_id = #{id}

UPDATE pgdev.support_inquiries SET answer_content_text = #{answerContentText}, status = #{status}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, answered_at = CASE WHEN #{status} = 'ANSWERED' THEN #{updatedAt} ELSE answered_at END WHERE inquiry_id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pgdev.support_inquiry_files ( inquiry_id, owner_type, file_role, original_file_name, stored_file_name, file_url, mime_type, file_size_bytes, inline_key, sort_order, uploaded_by_user_id, created_at ) VALUES ( #{inquiryId}, #{ownerType}, #{fileRole}, #{originalFileName}, #{storedFileName}, #{fileUrl}, #{mimeType}, #{fileSizeBytes}, #{inlineKey}, #{sortOrder}, #{uploadedByUserId}, #{createdAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pgdev.support_inquiries si WHERE si.status IN ('RECEIVED', 'IN_PROGRESS')

SELECT si.created_at AS created_at, si.answered_at AS answered_at FROM pgdev.support_inquiries si WHERE si.status = 'ANSWERED' AND si.answered_at IS NOT NULL AND si.answered_at >= #{fromDateTime} AND si.answered_at < #{toDateTimeExclusive}

SELECT si.inquiry_id, si.inquiry_no, si.user_id, COALESCE(u.name, u.username) AS author_name, u.username AS author_username, si.category_code, si.title, si.content_text, si.answer_content_text, si.status, si.has_attachments, si.created_at, si.updated_at, si.answered_at FROM pgdev.support_inquiries si JOIN pgdev.users u ON u.user_id = si.user_id WHERE si.status IN ('RECEIVED', 'IN_PROGRESS') ORDER BY si.created_at DESC, si.inquiry_id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
